compressed_prompt:
Titan makes clothing for large men. Write an advertisement for the company that would appeal to a wide audience. Make sentences short. Your response should not contain any comma.
Titan makes clothing for large men. Craft an ad appealing to a broad audience. Keep sentences concise. No commas in the text.
response:
# TITAN CLOTHING

## Built For The Bold

Every body deserves great style.

Titan knows this.

We build clothes for big men.

Strong men.

Real men.

Our fabric stretches where you need it.

Our stitching never quits.

Our fits are made to flatter.

You deserve to look sharp.

You deserve to feel confident.

You deserve clothes that actually fit.

Titan delivers all of that.

No squeezing in.

No pulling at seams.

No settling for less.

Just clean lines and bold style.

Just comfort that lasts all day.

Just clothing built around YOU.

Shop Titan today.

**Because great style has no size limit.**
